overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a NCART metro train journey through a futuristic city at sunset. The train travels from an enclosed urban canyon through elevated tracks with hazy golden-hour lighting, passing industrial buildings and neon signage before arriving at Glen South station.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed metro track in urban canyon

events.description: train begins moving forward, departing from station
train exits enclosed urban canyon into open elevated track with visible sky

agents.ego_description: train passenger seated inside NCART metro car, viewing the departure through the window

entered.detail: large flags with red and white stripes and blue triangle with star, hanging on building exterior
illuminated digital metro route map mounted inside the train car showing the NCART network
green metal window frames of the metro train

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a stationary view from inside a NCART metro train, showing Puerto Rican flags on a building exterior. The train starts moving around 6 seconds, traveling through an enclosed urban canyon with concrete walls and metal support structures. The metro map display remains visible on the right interior wall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track with panoramic industrial city views

events.description: hazy golden sunlight becomes visible as train emerges from enclosed section
passing DTR industrial building with blue neon signage and smokestacks

agents.ego_description: train passenger observing the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape through the window as the train travels on elevated tracks

entered.detail: large industrial structure with blue neon DTR signage and smokestacks emitting white vapor
hazy silhouette of downtown skyscrapers against orange sunset sky
metal rail tracks and support structures visible below the train

segments.scene_description: The train travels on elevated tracks through an open urban environment bathed in hazy golden-hour light. Industrial buildings with neon signage, including a prominent DTR facility, pass by on the left while the distant city skyline is visible through the smog. The metro map display remains visible inside the car on the right.

events.description: train approaches Glen South station platform with red neon signage
train slows down and comes to a complete stop at the station platform

agents.ego_description: train passenger waiting as the train arrives and stops at Glen South station

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading GLEN SOUTH on the station platform wall
concrete platform with yellow safety stripes and station lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Glen South station, with red neon signage becoming visible on the platform wall. The train slows and stops alongside the concrete platform, which features yellow safety markings and overhead lighting. The interior metro map display remains visible as the train comes to rest at the station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic confines of an urban canyon into a sprawling, sun-drenched cityscape that culminates at a transit hub. It begins with a stationary view of Puerto Rican flags on a building exterior before the train accelerates through a narrow corridor of concrete walls and metal supports, with a metro map visible on the interior wall. As the train emerges onto elevated tracks, the environment opens into a hazy golden-hour landscape where industrial buildings and neon DTR signage pass by against a smoggy city skyline. The scene then shifts toward the arrival at Glen South station, where red neon signage begins to appear on the platform walls. Finally, the train slows and comes to a complete stop alongside a concrete platform marked with yellow safety lines and overhead lighting.
